examples:
Command Example
!fd-update-ticket id=108 priority=Medium subject="Demonstrating Ticket Updating" assigned_agent=jeffrey.collins@gmail.com additional_fields="tags=almost completed,yep;attachments=2@5a0be47f-748f-4d60-8f46-81feb8f0c438"
Context Example
{
"Freshdesk.Ticket": {
"Status": 2,
"ResponderID": 2043022085976,
"DueBy": "2019-02-06T15:00:00Z",

!fd-update-ticket id=108 priority=Medium subject="Demonstrating Ticket Updating" assigned_agent=jeffrey.collins@gmail.com additional_fields="tags=almost completed,yep;attachments=2@5a0be47f-748f-4d60-8f46-81feb8f0c438"
Context Example
{
"Freshdesk.Ticket": {
"Status": 2,
"ResponderID": 2043022085976,
"DueBy": "2019-02-06T15:00:00Z",
"FrDueBy": "2019-02-06T14:00:00Z",
name: fd-update-ticket

outputs.description: ID of the updated ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Priority Ticket priority
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.ID

outputs.description: Date Timestamp that denotes when the ticket is due to be resolved Freshdesk.Ticket.Subject
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.DueBy

outputs.description: User ID of the requester Freshdesk.Ticket.Tag Tags associated with the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.RequesterID

outputs.description: ID of the group assigned to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Source The channel through which the ticket was created
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.GroupID

outputs.description: ID of the agent the ticket was assigned to Freshdesk.Ticket.FrDueBy Date
outputs.name: Number
Timestamp that denotes when the first response is due

outputs.description: Additional fields and values that were updated using the ‘additional_fields’ argument Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.AttachmentURL URL to download the file attached to the ticket to your local machine
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.AdditionalFields

outputs.description: The name of the file attached to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ContentType Content type of the attached file
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Name

outputs.description: ID number for the attached file Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Size Size of the attached file in bytes
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ID
